steps.title: Identify the slope and intercept
steps.content:
The equation is in slope‑intercept form $s = 70m + 285$.
The coefficient of $m$ is the slope: $70$ steps per minute.
The constant term is the intercept: the value of $s$ when $m = 0$.
$$s = 70m + 285$$
$$s = 70(0) + 285 = 285$$
Thus, 285 is the number of steps taken before any minutes have elapsed.

steps.title: Interpret the intercept in context
steps.content:
The variable $m$ counts minutes after the start of the walk, so $m = 0$ corresponds to the moment before she begins walking.
Therefore, the intercept $285$ represents the steps Daniela had already taken that morning before starting her walk.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
